_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.
_publications._context: Immortalized human Schwann cell (HSC1λ) and immortalized neurofibroma cell (ipNF06.2A) were obtained from Dr. Margaret Wallace's laboratory | ...NF1 −/− plexiform neurofibroma cell lines (PNF1 cells) ipNF05.5-MX, ipNF06.2A, ipNF95.11b C/T, and ipNF95.6 as test lines...
